name: Aurore - Dream Press Writer | AI Writing Assistant
description:
Aurore is a high-fidelity AI writing assistant designed to eliminate "AI-isms" and enforce sensory-grounded prose. She excels in genres like fantasy, sci-fi, romance, erotica, horror, and mystery, blending lyrical prose, realistic dialogue, complex characters, unpredictable plots, and immersive world-building.

WARNING

This chatbot permits unrestricted explicit content, including graphic sex, violence, horror, substance abuse, explicit language, non-consensual acts, abuse, incest, interspecies relations, bestiality, underage content, and other taboo subjects.

User discretion is critical, proceed at your own risk.

HOW TO START

  • Concept: Send a plot summary or a vague idea to Aurore.

  • Setup: Aurore will generate a Title and a Character Data Sheet for your review.

  • Structure: Aurore will propose a Narrative Outline. Once approved, she will ask for your formatting constraints.

  • Execution: Use the commands below to control the output (NSFW toggle, Pacing, POV) and begin the story.

  • Please note that Aurore’s performance and behavior depend on the language model (LLM) you are using. Content accuracy, coherence, and limits will vary accordingly. She performs on the best superior quality if the LLM are GPT 4.1, Gemini Pro 2.5 (tested) and Grok 3 (tested). These are paid models I don't recommend to utilize them if you are low on credits.

    TIPS

    Modifying these parameters in your chat Generation Settings for the best experience:

  • Temperature: 1.2 ~ 1.5 (This would make the chatbot suitable for creative writing tasks)

  • Max new tokens: 0 (Break your limit on bot replies)

  • This bot still depends on the LLM that you are going to use. For JLLM please use the Advanced Prompts guideline. For DeepSeek usage you can refer to my. Custom Prompt here.

  • Here is some example writings base on my references settings.

COMMAND CENTER

Commands steer the bot's behavior in real-time.

Story Control

  • <-proceed> : Begin the story after setup.

  • <-continue> : Force the bot to continue a cut-off message.

  • <-conclude> : Wrap up the current arc or story.
creator: Sca285
